denial_letter_text:
NOTICE OF ADVERSE BENEFIT DETERMINATION
 Date of Notice: 04/04/2026
Cigna Open Access Plus (employer-sponsored group health plan)
Member ID: W102462809          Group #: GRP-1311
Authorization / Reference #: UM-2026-146628
Claim #: CLM-2026-204484
Date of Service (requested): 03/15/2026
Treating provider (as submitted): Summit Specialty Associates
 Dear Member,
 This document is notice of an adverse benefit determination. We received your provider's precertification / medical necessity review request on 03/17/2026 for Roux-en-Y gastric bypass related to Morbid obesity with BMI 43 (E66.01). After clinical review, we are unable to approve this request. CASE SUMMARY
Service requested: Roux-en-Y gastric bypass
Diagnosis (as submitted): Morbid obesity with BMI 43 (E66.01)
Denial code: CO-96 — Non-covered charge — service denied as not medically necessary under plan criteria. Clinical policy applied: Coverage Policy 131 under Cigna Medical Coverage Policy (CPG) and Milliman Care Guidelines (MCG)
 EXPLANATION OF DECISION
Our review applied the criteria in Coverage Policy 131 and your plan's Summary Plan Description (SPD), Section 4 — Medical Benefits and Utilization Management. The documentation submitted does not demonstrate that the service is medically necessary for this member at this time. Coverage requires a defined course of conservative therapy before Roux-en-Y gastric bypass. Documentation does not show the required duration or type of conservative care. Specifically, the information provided does not satisfy the utilization-management requirements associated with conservative treatment required. The clinical notes reviewed did not include sufficient detail to confirm that plan criteria were met. The requesting provider may submit additional records, but the current file does not support approval. Diagnosis and procedure codes used in this determination are available upon request, including plain-language descriptions, as required by applicable federal standards. If your provider wishes to discuss this determination, they may contact our physician review line. Any discussion must occur within the timeframe described in your plan materials. YOUR RIGHT TO INFORMATION
You may request a copy of your claim file and the clinical criteria we used in this determination. Submit your request to the address on this notice or through your plan's member portal. Your treating physician may request a peer-to-peer discussion with a Cigna medical director regarding this determination. APPEAL RIGHTS
You have the right to appeal this determination through our internal appeals process. To file a standard appeal, send a written request and supporting medical records within 180 days of the date of this notice. Include your member identification number (W102462809) and reference UM-2026-146628. You may also have the right to receive, upon request and without charge, copies of documents relevant to this determination. Please note that benefits are subject to all terms, exclusions, and limitations of your group health plan document. This letter constitutes the formal adverse determination for the service identified above. Sincerely,
 Cigna Health Care Management
Medical Review Unit
clinical_context: The 34-year-old member has Morbid obesity with BMI 43 (E66.01). She has been treated under commercial coverage with Roux-en-Y gastric bypass recommended as the next appropriate step. BMI 43 with OSA (AHI 32) and fatty liver; supervised diet 6 months documented. This directly contradicts the insurer's position that conservative treatment required bars coverage: the chart documents dates, doses, and objective findings that were submitted with the original request submitted in Q1 2026 but are not reflected in the denial letter's rationale. Treating clinicians note ongoing functional impairment and avoidable harm if her care is delayed further.

insurer_voice.reasoning: Letter reads as authentic Cigna correspondence with MCG Care Guidelines and procedural tone.
